Our Story

Where Beauty Meets Serenity

Sanvila was born from a singular vision: to create a sanctuary in the heart of Kolkata where every person — regardless of gender — can experience world-class grooming and soul-refreshing spa treatments under one roof.

Our expert team of stylists and therapists bring years of training and passion to every session. From precision haircuts to rejuvenating spa rituals, we tailor each experience to your unique needs. Opening in July 2026 at 141/1 Regent Colony, NSCB Road.

✦
Expert Stylists

Trained in the latest techniques

✦
Premium Products

Only the finest brands used

✦
Hygienic & Safe

Strict sanitization protocols

What We Offer

Our Signature Services

A curated menu of beauty and wellness treatments crafted to restore, transform, and delight.

Hair Services

Expert cuts, styling, colouring and treatments for all hair types — adults and kids both welcome.

  • Haircut & Styling (Adult)
  • Kids Haircut
  • Hair Wash & Blow Dry
  • Hair Smoothening
  • Hair Straightening
  • Colour & Highlights
  • Keratin Treatment
  • Hair Spa & Conditioning

Skin & Facial

Revitalising facials, clean-ups, and advanced skin treatments for radiant, healthy skin.

  • Classic & Gold Facial
  • Deep Cleansing
  • Bleach & D-Tan
  • Anti-Aging Treatments

Spa & Massage

Escape the everyday with our signature spa therapies designed for deep relaxation and renewal.

  • Swedish Massage
  • Deep Tissue Therapy
  • Aromatherapy
  • Body Polishing
  • Head & Foot Massage

Nail & Beauty

Precision nail care, waxing and threading for a complete beauty regimen.

  • Manicure & Pedicure
  • Nail Extensions
  • Waxing & Threading
  • Bridal Beauty Packages

Bridal Packages

Bespoke bridal beauty packages to make your special day absolutely radiant and unforgettable.

  • Pre-Bridal Ritual
  • Bridal Makeup
  • Hair Styling
  • Complete Beauty Package

Men's Grooming

Dedicated men's grooming services including precision cuts, beard shaping, and skin treatments.

  • Haircut & Styling
  • Beard Trim & Shaping
  • Facial & Clean-up
  • Hair Colouring

Reservations

How to Book

Booking your appointment at Sanvila is simple — choose any channel below and we'll confirm your slot.

1
Choose a Channel
Reach us via WhatsApp, Facebook, Instagram DM, or Email — whichever is easiest for you.
2
Share Your Details
Tell us your name, the service you want, and your preferred date & time.
3
Get Confirmed
We'll reply within a few hours to confirm your appointment slot.
4
Visit & Relax
Arrive at Sanvila and enjoy a premium experience crafted just for you.
